query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bug_report_rewards (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  comment_id INT NOT NULL,
  member_id VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  reward_amount INT NOT NULL,
  verified_by VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4F6C2t2Lf5vYuZz.root --database 7FPMMwR5T9Ji4CdJvw8T5d --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bug_report_rewards (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  comment_id INT NOT NULL,
  member_id VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  reward_amount INT NOT NULL,
  verified_by VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
